description: Crafted with delectable blue dyed nubuck - we can't get enough of this velvety shoe! A blunt toe cup for a feminine appeal, with ankle strap for an elegant finish, wear this pair with lacy, sheer ankle socks for maximum impact. Perfect for the summer (with stylish cutouts at the toe) this pair goes with just about anything - cropped pants, skirts, jeans or even leggings! Get this pair before stocks run out...UpperNubuck upper with a designer toe cap and a heel cap with buckled strap at the ankle to customise the FitCut outs on toe boxLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole grooved at the forefoot with a grooved heel patch in rubber for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
